query: SELECT id, name, email, company, phone, status, leadSource, callTranscript, conversationSummary, painPoints, wants, currentSolutions, callDurationSeconds, conversationId, createdAt FROM leads WHERE email LIKE '%castronovo%' OR name LIKE '%mary%' OR name LIKE '%MaryLou%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3u5F3XZPfiBR6CY.root --database jiUKWZNCEesKEKgdJkoZwj --execute SELECT id, name, email, company, phone, status, leadSource, callTranscript, conversationSummary, painPoints, wants, currentSolutions, callDurationSeconds, conversationId, createdAt FROM leads WHERE email LIKE '%castronovo%' OR name LIKE '%mary%' OR name LIKE '%MaryLou%' ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
